embeds.title: 📜 Server Rules & Development Guidelines
embeds.description: Welcome to the collaborative forge. By participating in this server, you agree to the following rules. Please read them carefully.

fields.name: 1️⃣ Open Source & Code Sharing Policy
fields.value:
**Freely Shared Code:** This is a collaborative space. Any code viewable in public channels is shared freely for the community to learn from.

**Private Collaboration:** Use Private Channels (available upon request) for proprietary work. 

**Documentation Requirement:** Share code via direct snippets, GitHub/GitLab links, or direct source links. All shared material must comply with its original host's ToS.

fields.name: 2️⃣ Malicious Content & Security
fields.value:
**Zero Tolerance for Malware:** Code marked as Malicious by Bots or Staff will be instantly removed.

**Strike System:** Posting malicious code, phishing, or deceptive scripts results in a formal Strike.

**Immediate Review:** Flagged users are placed "Under Review" pending a full human audit.

fields.name: 3️⃣ Fair Review & Ban Appeals
fields.value:
**Right to Explain:** You get one (1) chance to explain a serious violation for your case file.

**Agreement Requirement:** A ban requires unanimous agreement from at least 3 Admins/Mods.

**Full Disclosure:** Banned members receive their case file via email (valid email required). Failure to participate = automatic ban.

**Data Destruction:** Upon final ban, all code submitted by the user is destroyed.

fields.name: 4️⃣ Community Conduct (The Human Element)
fields.value:
**Zero Harassment:** No bullying, hate speech, or personal/political attacks. Keep personal worldviews private to ensure a creative environment.

**Truthfulness:** Do not spread misinformation or "Fake News."

**The Coding Creed:**
`01101011 01100101 01100101 01110000 00100000 01101001 01110100 00100000 01110011 01101001 01101101 01110000 01101100 01100101` (Keep it simple)
`01101111 01101110 01100101 00100000 01100001 01110000 01110000 00100000 01100001 01110100 00100000 01100001 00100000 01110100 01101001 01101101 01100101` (One app at a time)

footer.text: 🛡️ The Guard: Treat all Ban Flags as False Positives first, but report Confirmed Malware immediately.
